forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+color: 9900cc
+description: 'MCP-based Command Service that replaces the YAML command architecture in `swissarmyhammer-commands` + `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/commands/`. Built on the plugin platform: the service is a registered MCP server (`commands`) exposing a single `command` operation tool with verbs register/list/execute/available/unregister/schema. All 62+ built-in commands (across 11 YAML files) migrate to TypeScript plugins under `builtin/plugins/`. Override-stack semantics let plugins replace built-ins. Frontend `useDispatchCommand` routes through MCP. Tauri `#[tauri::command]` handlers split out to separate `window`/`app` MCP servers. Cut-over milestone: YAML loader and `swissarmyhammer-commands` Rust crate deleted in the same change set. Source: ideas/plugins/command-service.md.'
+name: Command Service
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-color: 9900cc
-description: 'MCP-based Command Service that replaces the YAML command architecture in `swissarmyhammer-commands` + `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/commands/`. Built on the plugin platform: the service is a registered MCP server (`commands`) exposing a single `command` operation tool with verbs register/list/execute/available/unregister/schema. All 62+ built-in commands (across 11 YAML files) migrate to TypeScript plugins under `builtin/plugins/`. Override-stack semantics let plugins replace built-ins. Frontend `useDispatchCommand` routes through MCP. Tauri `#[tauri::command]` handlers split out to separate `window`/`app` MCP servers. Cut-over milestone: YAML loader and `swissarmyhammer-commands` Rust crate deleted in the same change set. Source: ideas/plugins/command-service.md.'
-name: Command Service

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 color: 9900cc
-description: 'MCP-based Command Service that replaces the YAML command architecture in `swissarmyhammer-commands` + `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/commands/`. Built on the plugin platform: the service is a registered MCP server (`commands`) exposing a single `command` operation tool with verbs register/list/execute/available/unregister/schema. All 62+ built-in commands (across 11 YAML files) migrate to TypeScript plugins under `builtin/plugins/`. Override-stack semantics let plugins replace built-ins. Frontend `useDispatchCommand` routes through MCP. Tauri `#[tauri::command]` handlers split out to separate `window`/`app` MCP servers. Cut-over milestone: YAML loader and `swissarmyhammer-commands` Rust crate deleted in the same change set. Source: ideas/plugins/command-service.md.'
-name: Command Service
+description: 'Tier 0 foundational. The Command MCP *engine* only — not the specific commands. Operation structs + registration payload schema, registry with override-stack semantics, the six verbs (register/list/execute/available/unregister/schema), callback marshalling, host bootstrap + ledger-driven auto-cleanup, the SDK helpers (ensureServices/registerCommands), and execute''s transaction-bracket + commands/executed action emit. Uses the merged operation_tool! macro. The commands themselves live in builtin-commands; the backends they call in command-backends; event propagation in command-events. Source: ideas/plugins/command-service.md.'
+name: Command Service (engine)
